findings.geneticAnalysis: CT; public StrateGene Folate/MTHFR sample PDF observed separately as sibling output-structure evidence. findings.sourceLabel: CDC MTHFR Gene Variant and Folic Acid Facts
findings.plainEnglishMeaning: CDC framing is used here: common MTHFR variants can be discussed as folate-processing context, but they do not by themselves support avoiding folic acid or changing supplements.

uncertainty: Methylation-pathway interpretation cannot be reduced to two MTHFR markers.
Folate, homocysteine, supplement, pregnancy, medication, and treatment decisions require broader context and qualified professional review.
The StrateGene sample PDF demonstrates possible report layout and row structure but does not validate local methylation conclusions.
limitations: This validation result uses derived evidence only; raw genome data is not included.

The package is educational and does not report methylation capacity, detox status, diagnosis, pregnancy outcome prediction, supplement instructions, medication response, treatment guidance, or StrateGene proprietary scoring.
The sibling sample PDF supports sample-backed formal output structure, not full marketplace detail-page parity or clinical actionability.
